name: elevenlabs-conversation-tool
description: Multi-speaker conversation tool with ElevenLabs voice synthesis

scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd .. && npm run postbuild
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p public && cp -r client/build/* public/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.eb-postinstall: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && npm run postbuild
scripts.test: cd server && npm test && cd ../client && npm test
